features: Original Source: We capture the intensity nature has to offer. Original Source is made with 100 Percent natural fragrances, we’re inspired by nature, from bold scents and vibrant colours, we've made it our mission to share fresh sensorial hits in every shower

The Power of Nature: We've waited for 82 British sunrises to help ripen our raspberries before we squeeze them with vanilla into every bottle. 100 Percent natural fragrance added in to every bottle of shower gel. Shower gel that helps leaves your skin feeling soft and smelling of creamy vanilla and raspberry sweetness.
Paraben Free: The Raspberry and Vanilla shower wash has been consciously made without parabens

100 Percent Vegan and cruelty free: Original Source is proudly vegan and we carry the logo on all products. products are tested on us, never on animals. This unique fragrance is created to offer a shower experience to stimulate the senses with an intense hit of nature.
Shower gel mutlipack: Extend your daily dose of fruitiness and nature with this 6 x shower gel multipack of 250 ml bottles
description: Product Description A shower gel multipack with 6 bottles bursting with a different and fruity fragrance! Experience a moisturising shower gel that helps leaves your skin feeling soft and smelling sweet with our Creamy Vanilla & Raspberry Shower gel. We've waited 82 British sunrises to help ripen our raspberries before we squeeze them with vanilla and pack them into every bottle. Products are tested on us, never on animals, paraben free and we’re proud to be Vegan too. Original Source Shower Gel is manufactured in the UK using 100 Percent renewable energy and our bottles are 100 Percent recyclable. Enjoy your daily shower time with a sensorial hit of nature. Safety Warning Be careful to avoid eyes, it's not for them it's for your body! Box Contains 6 x Original Source Shower Gel Vanilla Milk & Raspberry 250ml Manufacturer Contact Information Freepost PZ Cussons (UK) Ltd 3500 Aviator Way, Manchester M22 5TG See more
